scripts.postinstall: npm run build -w @socialmedialite/shared && npx prisma generate --schema ./packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @socialmedialite/shared && npm run db:generate && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
